title: Vaajav Re
overview: Man born and brought up in poor family. Never got applauded by society for his passion of playing Kacchi Dhol But he got recognized in Girgaon Cha Raja for playing kacchi dhol and now whole Maharashtra knows him as Girgaon Cha Ladka Milind
